Deft Shlley S Buchanan'S Ntc Of Mtn & Ntn For Sanctions P Purs To Ccp 128.7 Against Pltf & His Attys, Calendar Motion: Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-29-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. 409-7611 for pltf & opposing party; Jason Marachi, Esq. 566-3526 for deft & moving party Shelley S. Buchanan; Shelley S. Buchanan, Esq. 566-3520 for deft Terrence West.
RULING: Argued and the Court sustains the demurrer without leave to amend as to all causes of action except that the 4th cause of action intentional infliction, 5th cause of action negligent infliction of emotional distress, 7th cause of action malicious prosecution, & 9th cause of action violation of S.F. administrative code, are all sustained with leave to amend; motion to strike - off calendar as moot; sanctions denied. Pltf to prepare order.
